Operation 'lookupPayment' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary is generic and doesn't specify the key input (pidx). Description lacks details about required inputs, comprehensive output information, and the operational context of when to use this operation. Enhanced version specifies the pidx requirement, details the response structure (status, amount, customer info, payment method), and clarifies the operational workflow for AI agents to understand the complete payment verification process.

data.current_description: Verifies the status of a payment using the payment identifier (pidx) to confirm transaction completion.
data.summary_suggestion: Verify payment transaction status using pidx
data.description_suggestion: Verifies the status of a previously initiated payment transaction using the payment identifier (pidx). Requires the pidx from the payment initiation response. Returns detailed payment information including transaction status, amount, customer details, and payment method. Use this operation after user completes payment to confirm transaction success and retrieve payment details for order fulfillment.
data.reasoning: Original summary is generic and doesn't specify the key input (pidx). Description lacks details about required inputs, comprehensive output information, and the operational context of when to use this operation. Enhanced version specifies the pidx requirement, details the response structure (status, amount, customer info, payment method), and clarifies the operational workflow for AI agents to understand the complete payment verification process.

message: Operation 'refundTransaction' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary is too generic and doesn't indicate full/partial refund capability. Description lacks critical input details (transaction ID parameter, request body requirements), comprehensive output information, and important side effects (refund destination, transaction state requirements). Enhanced version specifies the path parameter requirement, request body expectations, supported payment methods, return value, refund destination, and operational constraints to help AI agents understand when and how to use this refund operation.

data.current_description: Processes a full or partial refund for a previously completed transaction. Supports both wallet and bank payment refunds.
data.summary_suggestion: Process full or partial transaction refund
data.description_suggestion: Processes a full or partial refund for a previously completed payment transaction. Requires the transaction ID as a path parameter and refund amount/details in the request body. Supports refunds for all payment methods including Khalti wallet, eBanking, mobile banking, and card payments. Returns refund confirmation with refund status. Refunded amounts are credited back to the original payment method. Note: Refunds can only be processed for completed transactions.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic and doesn't indicate full/partial refund capability. Description lacks critical input details (transaction ID parameter, request body requirements), comprehensive output information, and important side effects (refund destination, transaction state requirements). Enhanced version specifies the path parameter requirement, request body expectations, supported payment methods, return value, refund destination, and operational constraints to help AI agents understand when and how to use this refund operation.
